creator: dev@jackson-spencer.ca
text:
The blender-devel port doesn't build since OpenEXR was updated to
1.4.0. A needed library (libIlmThread.a) is missing from the link.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

cd /usr/ports/graphics/blender-devel
patch < blender.txt

The patch adds libIlmThread.a to the link.


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/blender-devel
make all
